_comment: Screenshot library for the Instagram content engine. Each entry maps a stable key -> a real, clean app screenshot the carousel/video renderers embed in phone frames. Keys are referenced from carousel specs (slide.screenshot / slide.image) and video specs. Paths are relative to the repo root. Refresh a shot by re-capturing on the simulator and overwriting the file (keep the key). See README.md for the capture guide.
device: iPhone 17 Pro (1320x2868, clean capture, no marketing chrome)

menu-scan-result.desc: Menu Analysis result — cal/protein/carb/fat rings, scanned MENU photo, Grilled Salmon graded Good with Inflammation 1/10. The flagship 'point camera at food -> instant graded scorecard' payoff.

fridge-scan.desc: 'Your fridge can make 5 meals today' — fridge photo scanned, ingredients detected, recipes suggested.

form-check-pushup.desc: AI Form Check — Push-up scored 80/Good, Form/Tempo/Range sub-scores, 'What you did well' + 'To improve'. The differentiator payoff for form content.

strength-score.desc: Stats & Scores — Overall Strength 50 (Intermediate), 'stronger than 49% of comparable lifters', strength-by-muscle map + trend.

coach-chat.desc: Coach chat — logs 'two chicken tacos and a Corona', coach replies with macro-aware guidance; Scan Food / Analyze Menu / Nutrition quick chips.

active-workout-set.desc: Guided active workout — Smith Machine Shoulder Press, set 1 of 4, 55x12 target, Log Set, Form check / Instructions tabs.

home-coach-nudge.desc: Home — coach nudge ('Let's pick it up, Gigi'), protein/calories left, Get Started Challenge, Lower Body Focus hero card.

home-recovery.desc: Home (Thursday) — coach recovery nudge, macros, Lower Body Focus. Alt home shot.

schedule-programs.desc: Schedule — HYROX Race Prep + Functional Power + Full-Body Conditioning stacked; shows running multiple programs at once.

schedule-week.desc: Schedule week view with workout cards (Lower Body Focus, Savage Beast Annihilation).

schedule-week-alt.desc: Schedule week view alt (Full Body Activation, Upper Body Push & Core).

schedule-week-2.desc: Schedule week view (Upper Body Push, Lower Body Focus, Upper Body Power).

customize-program.desc: Customize Program — workout days/week, difficulty, duration slider. Shows the AI plan is fully adjustable.

customize-perday-focus.desc: Customize Program Per-day — focus chips (Upper/Lower/Push/Pull/Legs/Core/Cardio/Mobility/Recovery), duration, intensity (Hell).

imports-ai.desc: Imports — 'Import anything with AI' (photo/PDF/audio/text), MyFitnessPal/MacroFactor/Cronometer/Apple Health.

imports-ai-alt.desc: Imports alt — includes Fitbod / Gravl workout export sources.
